---
title: The making of the lollipop chart, in Python
subtitle: AE 16
execute: 
  eval: false
---

# Setup

-   Load packages:

```{python}
#| label: load-packages
#| eval: false
# add code here
```

-   Load data:

```{python}
#| label: load-data
#| eval: false
# add code here
```

# Lollipop chart

Recreate the lollipop chart from `ae-16-R.qmd`.

```{python}
#| label: lollipop-chart
#| eval: false
# add code here
```
